allow: PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "c:\\wamp64\\www\\HTML projects\\AFRICA_WINE_FOOD\\blog.html"; Write-Host "Total lines: $\($lines.Count\)"; Write-Host "--- LAST 20 lines ---"; $lines[-20..-1])

PowerShell($css = Get-Content "c:\\wamp64\\www\\HTML projects\\AFRICA_WINE_FOOD\\style.css"; Write-Host "Total CSS lines: $\($css.Count\)"; $blogLines = $css | Select-String "BLOG" | Select-Object -First 5; $blogLines | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Line $\($_.LineNumber\): $\($_.Line\)" })

PowerShell($lines = Get-Content "c:\\wamp64\\www\\HTML projects\\AFRICA_WINE_FOOD\\blog.html"; $checks = @\("Schema.org","blog-filters-bar","blog-page-layout","blog-sidebar","keywords-section","seo-tag","sidebar-product-mini","article-toc","article-cta-box","newsletter"\); foreach \($c in $checks\) { $found = $lines | Select-String $c | Select-Object -First 1; if \($found\) { Write-Host "✓ $c \(line $\($found.LineNumber\)\)" } else { Write-Host "✗ MISSING: $c" } })
